app.name: SkillLink
app.tagline: Find verified skilled professionals near you within minutes.

home.tagline: Find a verified professional near you, in minutes.
home.heroSub: Electricians, plumbers, AC & solar technicians and more — vetted, rated, and ready to help.
home.providerCtaSub: Get matched with customers near you. Set your own rates and schedule.
home.error: Could not load services. Is the API running?
home.searchWhat: What do you need help with?
home.popularSub: Handpicked experts for your common needs.
home.howSub: From “I need help” to a verified pro at your door.
home.how1Body: Pick a service and your area in Kandy. We match you to nearby pros in seconds.
home.how2Body: See verified providers with ratings, distance and real work photos. Pick the one you trust.
home.how3Body: Track the job live, chat, and pay securely when the work is complete.
home.whySub: We've built the most trusted network of service providers to give you peace of mind with every booking.
home.whyVerifiedBody: Every professional undergoes a multi-step background check and ID verification before they can take jobs.
home.whyPricingBody: No hidden fees. Get a clear quote and pay securely in the app — only when you're satisfied.
home.whyGuaranteeBody: Every job booked through SkillLink is backed by our satisfaction guarantee. Your home is in safe hands.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitlePhone: Enter your mobile number to continue
login.subtitleCode: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {phone}
login.phoneHint: We'll text you a one-time code.
login.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Sri Lankan mobile number.
login.trust: Secure sign-in · No password to remember
login.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
login.panelTitle: Trusted help, just a tap away.
login.panelSub: Sign in to book verified local professionals — or manage the jobs you take on as a provider.
login.panelPoint3: Track every booking end to end

book.title: Book a service
book.subtitle: Choose what you need — we'll match you with verified pros nearby.
book.error: Could not load services. Please try again.
book.confirmOnMap: confirm the exact spot on the map next

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and notifications.
profile.uploadError: Could not upload the photo. Try again.
profile.safetyContactsHint: These people can be alerted if you raise an SOS during a job.

errors.internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Sri Lankan mobile number (+94…).
auth.otpInvalid: That code is invalid or expired.
auth.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
auth.tokenInvalid: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forbidden: You don't have access to this.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: OTP accounts — no passwords. Suspend blocks login & ends sessions; Force logout ends sessions (user logs back in with a fresh OTP).
users.confirmSuspend: Suspend {phone}? They'll be signed out and blocked from logging in until reactivated.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Settled payments, commission earned, and payouts to providers.

safety.subtitle: Active safety alerts and open reports awaiting review.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Every admin mutation is recorded here.

categories.title: Categories & Sub-services
categories.subtitle: The services customers can book. Type the English name — the rest fills in.
categories.typeHint: Top-level service, or a sub-service under one of them.
categories.keyHint: Generated from the name. Used internally — edit only if needed.
categories.errDeriveKey: Could not derive a key — enter one manually.
categories.name: Name
categories.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this? This cannot be undone.

districts.title: Districts
districts.subtitle: Coverage — activate a district to make its providers matchable immediately.
districts.launchNote: v1 launches in Kandy. Add a district then activate it to expand — providers there become matchable immediately.
districts.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this? This cannot be undone.

verifications.title: Provider Verification Queue
verifications.subtitle: Review submitted documents, then approve or reject each provider.
verifications.viewFull: Click a document to view full size

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Platform configuration. Editable settings move here as they're built.
settings.intro: Editable settings (commission, regions) move here as they're built; district activation is under <districts>Districts</districts>.
settings.editSubtitle: Edit platform config. Changes apply immediately to new transactions.
settings.commissionHint: Percentage the platform keeps from each completed booking.
settings.pointsPerLkrHint: Reward points a customer earns per LKR 100 spent.
settings.matchingHint: How providers are ranked. Weights should sum to about 1.
settings.weightsSumHint: Weights currently sum to {sum} — aim for ~1.0 for balanced ranking.

dash.priceDisclaimer: Typical price — final quote from your pro
dash.customerSubtitle: Track your bookings and find help fast.
dash.becomeProviderConfirmBody: Your account will also work as a provider so you can offer services and accept jobs. You can switch back to customer mode anytime.
dash.noBookingsYet: No bookings yet. Tap “Book a service” to get started.
dash.availabilityVisible: You are visible to new job requests.
dash.availabilityHidden: You are hidden from new job requests.
dash.availabilityPending: Available once your account is approved.
dash.completeVerification: Complete your verification to start receiving jobs →
dash.noEarningsYet: No earnings yet — completed jobs will show here.
dash.workPhotosHint: Show real photos of jobs you've completed. Customers see these when choosing a provider — it's the best way to win bookings.
dash.noWorkPhotos: No work photos yet. Add a few photos of your best jobs.
dash.noWorkPhotosPublic: This provider hasn't added work photos yet.
dash.referDashboardHint: Share your code — you both get rewarded.
dash.referExplainer: Share your code. They get {referee} points when they join, and you get {referrer} points.
dash.referredCount: {count, plural, =0 {No referrals yet} one {# friend joined} other {# friends joined}}
dash.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
dash.uploadTooLargeServer: That image is too large to upload. Please try a smaller photo.
dash.workPhotosFull: You've reached the 12-photo limit. Remove one to add another.
dash.photosCount: {count, plural, one {# work photo} other {# work photos}}
dash.payExplainer: Pay securely in-app, or pay the provider in cash — either way your booking is recorded.
dash.myJobsSubtitle: Respond to requests and keep your jobs moving.
dash.youAreNowProvider: You are now a provider (pending verification).
dash.switchModeConfirmBody: You'll move to your {mode} dashboard. You can switch back anytime.
dash.goOnlineTapOffline: You are Online — tap to go offline
dash.submittedForReviewBody: Our team will verify your details. You'll appear in customer searches once approved.
dash.townsHint: Pick every town you'll travel to. You'll be matched with customers in any of them.
dash.townsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {No towns selected} one {# town selected} other {# towns selected}}
dash.cancelConfirmBody: This will cancel your booking. You can always book again later.
dash.cancelFeeWarning: This provider has already committed to your job, so a cancellation fee may apply.
dash.cancelFeeCharged: Your booking was cancelled. A cancellation fee applies.
dash.noShowConfirmBody: Tell us the provider never arrived. This cancels the booking and flags it on their record. Only do this if they truly didn’t show up.
dash.noShowReported: Reported. The booking has been cancelled as a no-show.
dash.reportCashBody: If your customer paid you in cash, report it here. It keeps your record honest and counts toward your standing on SkillLink.
dash.reportCashDone: Thanks — your cash payment has been recorded.
dash.pickTimeRequired: Please choose a date and time.
dash.setYourPriceHint: Quote a price for this job. The customer accepts before you start.
dash.quoteAccepted: Quote accepted — the provider can now start the job.
dash.awaitingQuote: Waiting for the provider to send a price quote.
dash.paymentSettled: Payment recorded. You earned reward points!
dash.pointsEarnedNote: Reward points have been added to your account.
dash.owesCommission: You owe commission — top up to keep receiving jobs.
dash.activeToday: You have {count} active {count, plural, one {booking} other {bookings}} in progress.
dash.noActivityYet: No activity yet — your completed jobs and rewards show up here.
dash.promoSub: Share your code — they get {referee} points when they join, and you get {referrer}.
dash.describeRequired: Please describe what you need help with (a few words is enough).
dash.needHelpWith: What do you need help with?
dash.whereService: Where do you need the service?
dash.categorySubtitle: Tell us what you need and find a verified provider nearby.
dash.noProvidersNote: No providers available near your location yet.

loc.mapHint: Tap the map or drag the pin to set the exact spot.
loc.gpsFailed: Couldn't get GPS. Use the map or enter coordinates below.

session.title: Session expired
session.body: Your session has ended for security. Please sign in again to continue.
session.suspendedBody: This account has been suspended. Please contact support if you think this is a mistake.
